description: L1 part presence rate per GT×IT — tells UI which parts to display for each filter combination

tier_rules.必備 (essential): ≥ 80% designs have this part → always show

_consumer: index.html (前端 UI 決定哪些 L1 part 顯示)
_source: 從 m7 entries.jsonl + Centric 8 PLM 計算 L1 part 在各 GT×IT 出現率
_generator: (無 in-repo writer; 推測由聚陽端 / 本機 ad-hoc script 產出後 push)
